curation_notes: Pre-assigned as xss from CWE-79, but the patch fixes unsanitized file path input where the file extension is derived from an attacker-controlled URL, allowing executable files to be written to disk — reclassified to path-traversal. Patch commit identified from advisory reference dompdf/dompdf@4c70e10. Only 1 non-test source file changed (src/FontMetrics.php). Location derived from the patch diff: the fix replaces extension derivation from the remote URL with a switch on font type in the registerFont function. No sibling files contain the same vulnerability pattern; the only other PATHINFO_EXTENSION usage in src/Dompdf.php already validates against an allowlist.
